name: NeoCube
short_description: A game of exploring QR codes! Multiplayer coming soon!
detailed_description:
A Game of QR Codes!

Features

  • Unlimited Fun Avoiding a QR Code
  • Single Player

Coming Soon

  • Multiplayer Mode
  • Party Mode (Play on a TV with Friends using your phone)
  • Co-Op Mode (Side by Side)
  • Music based on game performance
  • Online Leader Boards
  • Ranks/ Skills

About Snaju Development

Snaju Development is a software development company out of Houston, Texas. We mainly write software for Space Command and Control/ Avionic Software for payloads going to the International Space Station. In our spare time we have been working on building games for fun and this is the first product of our work!
